name: The Anguished One
description:
๋ ࣭ ⭑ Hello there, Shining one~ ⭑ ࣭ ๋
˗ˏˋ ☆ ˎˊ˗



                    ✧ ̇
         ✧                ✧
                                     ✧                   ✧
                                          ✧        ✧



Okay so, uhh hello everyone, this is my first bot... So all of you had to endure me updating it again and again. Apologizes for anyone who chatted with him before the updates only to find now that he changed drastically- i think i am very close to finalizing this and be able to finally move on- i think he is already finished but there is testing to be done...
Alcor is my most favorite character so i have to make him right, i really want to make him right... qwq
Also please forgive me for my bad English, i am self taught so errors may exist xP


The most recent update affected heavily the Scenario, decreasing the token count while i cut out what i thought as restrictive towards the User's freedom- why explain Septentriones' appearances, JPs mannerisms, and even Hibiki? What if you want to add Septentriones, be a JPs employee, or even be Hibiki? who am i to stop you right? xD


Also i updated the first message! made it fancier uwu
Also, also— added a second intro without italic Markdown for the description; some people (ahem, me.) like it more that way so why not?


So yeah i removed such things... you can take a look for yourself- though if you don't want spoilers then just read scenario and don't touch the "Personality" section as that's where his... well, personality (from my point of view) exists... Also, JPs or the Hotsuin family aren't mentioned anywhere so if you want them to be as they are in the game/anime, then you can add the information needed in memory chat- what i wrote before i cut it out was
"Alcor gave the Hotsuin family the means to summon demons ages ago."
in the personality section so you may begin with this if you want them in no matter what.


i thought making the definition public may be useful to the few people who are interested in a role play with Alcor.


Feel free to leave comments and the like about improvements and whatnot! This is how i view Alcor so i ain't sure if i'll change much but i'll sure like to understand him more regardless.

I initially tried to optimize him for R1 Deepseek and Deepseek V3 but be fair i realize i can't really do that- anybody's prompt heavily affects h
creator: TilaniTaliarin
